description:
Consolidate Next.js as the single user-facing frontend for both the public marketing page and analytics dashboard. No new tech stack — Tailwind is already installed.

**Route restructure:**
- app/page.tsx (current analytics) → app/dashboard/page.tsx
- app/page.tsx (new) → public marketing homepage

**Marketing page sections:**
- Navbar: company name + "Back Office" button linking to NEXT_PUBLIC_ADMIN_URL
- Hero: company name, tagline, services intro
- What We Do: 4 service cards (Heat Treatment, Surface Hardening, Quality Inspection, Production Tracking)
- Why Choose Us: GST registered, quality, reliability
- Footer: address, GSTIN

**Env vars to add in .env.local.example:**
NEXT_PUBLIC_COMPANY_NAME, NEXT_PUBLIC_COMPANY_ADDRESS, NEXT_PUBLIC_COMPANY_GSTIN, NEXT_PUBLIC_ADMIN_URL

**Django: zero changes.** Staff continue using localhost:8000/admin/ for data entry.

Full plan at: plans/website-cover.md
title: Add public marketing homepage to Next.js dashboard
